ringbuffer_t(3) Library Functions Manual ringbuffer_t(3)

NAME

ringbuffer_t - Lock-free ring buffer structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/ringbuffer.h>

Data Fields


char * buffer
The actual buffer memory. size_t element_size
Size of each element in bytes. size_t capacity
Number of elements that can be stored. atomic_t head
Write position (producer) - atomic for lock-free operations. atomic_t tail
Read position (consumer) - atomic for lock-free operations. atomic_t size
Current number of elements - atomic for fast size checks. bool is_power_of_two
Whether capacity is power of 2 (enables bit masking optimization). size_t capacity_mask
Mask for fast modulo when capacity is power of 2.

Detailed Description

Lock-free ring buffer structure.

Implements a lock-free circular buffer using atomic operations for thread-safe producer-consumer data transfer without locking overhead.

Definition at line 88 of file ringbuffer.h.

Field Documentation
